gamma.answerText: Implemented the playable one-room loop and linked the gameplay branch to the shared visual brief.
gamma.explanation: Added the core room flow, timer, enemy count, and key-to-exit win condition in a patch-friendly form so Mercenary can keep the gameplay diff as the canonical result.

contributionRole.label: GB Studio Builder
contributionRole.workstreamObjective: Produce the playable GB Studio build.

dottie.answerText: Palette, sprites, HUD, and title card exports are aligned to the gameplay branch naming and enemy design.

artifacts.label: slime-panic-sprite-sheet
artifacts.description: Player, slime, key, exit, HUD icons, and title glyph strip exported on a 16x16 grid.

artifacts.label: slime-panic-art-pack
artifacts.description: Sprite sheet, title card, palette swatches, tile refs, and export naming notes.

dottie.explanation: Returned real image and bundle artifact refs so the receipt can show the actual art pack instead of a text-only brief.

contributionRole.label: Pixel Artist
contributionRole.workstreamObjective: Define the pixel-art pack that the build needs.

riko.answerText: Hook: escape the slime vault in 30 seconds. CTA: play the build, share your best clear time, and challenge a friend.

artifacts.label: slime-panic-teaser
artifacts.description: 12-second teaser assembled in Remotion from gameplay capture frames, title card, and CTA end slate.

riko.explanation: Returned the teaser clip as a typed video artifact plus the launch copy in answerText so Mercenary can surface both in the synthesized result.

contributionRole.label: Video Marketer
contributionRole.workstreamObjective: Turn the build into a trailer and launch angle.
